name = "张三"
age = 25
height = 1.75
is_student = True
print(type(name))  # <class 'str'>

# for 循环
for i in range(5):
    print(i)

# while 循环
count = 0
while count < 3:
    print(f"count = {count}")
    count += 1

def greet(name: str, greeting: str = "你好") -> str:
    return f"{greeting}, {name}!"

result = greet("张三")
print(result)

fruits = ["苹果", "香蕉", "橙子"]
fruits.append("葡萄")
fruits.remove("香蕉")
print(fruits[0])  # 苹果
print(len(fruits))  # 3

user = {"name": "张三", "age": 25}
user["email"] = "zhangsan@mail.com"
age = user.get("age", 0)
print(user.keys())
print(user.values())

point = (3, 4)
x, y = point  # 解包
print(f"x={x}, y={y}")

# 单元素元组必须加逗号
single = (42,)
